text: Pete Hegseth is reshaping the Pentagon through an aggressive purge of senior leaders, firing more than 20 generals in moves critics call “unprecedented.” Many dismissals reportedly lacked clear justification, with some tied to perceived politics or identity. Former officials describe his Pentagon as driven by “vindictiveness, politicisation” and an effort to impose a “virile, anti-woke ‘warrior ethos’,” sometimes at odds with international law. One critic mocked his approach: “He’s a 12-year-old boy…who likes to play war.” Source: The Economist
text_zh: 皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）正在通过对高级领导层进行激进清洗来重塑五角大楼，解雇了20多名将军，此举被批评者称为“史无前例”。据报道，许多解雇缺乏明确的理由，其中一些与被认为的政治立场或身份有关。前官员形容他领导下的五角大楼受到“报复心、政治化”的驱动，并试图强加一种“阳刚、反觉醒的‘战士精神’”，这有时与国际法相抵触。一位批评者嘲讽他的做法：“他就像一个12岁的男孩……喜欢玩战争游戏。”来源：《经济学人》

text: OSINTdefender According to Axios, citing two U.S. officials, a three-page plan is at the center of U.S.-Iranian peace talks. One facet of the plan reportedly being discussed by both sides is the release of $20 billion in frozen Iranian funds in exchange for Iran giving up its stockpiles of enriched uranium. Per the report, earlier in the negotiation process, the U.S. offered the release of $6 billion and the Iranians countered with a demand to release $27 billion. U.S. officials have described the potential deal as a “cash-for-uranium concept.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据Axios援引两名美国官员的话称，一份三页的计划是美伊和平谈判的核心。据报道，双方正在讨论的计划的一个方面是释放200亿美元的伊朗冻结资金，以换取伊朗放弃其浓缩铀库存。据报道，在谈判过程的早期，美国提出释放60亿美元，而伊朗则反要求释放270亿美元。美国官员将这一潜在协议描述为“以现金换铀的概念”。推文

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，这是43年来以色列首次与黎巴嫩直接对话：“我提醒你们，这是43年来以色列国代表首次直接对话……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列正走在和平之路上，尽管道路漫长，一手持武器，另一手伸向和平：“通往和平的道路依然漫长；我们已经开始了旅程，一手持武器，另一手伸向和平。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has changed the face middle east due to Israels achievements and that he accepted negotiations with Lebanon at Trumps request: ​"With which we changed the face of the Middle East and brought…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that it is the first time in 43 years that Israel has directly talked with Lebanon: "And I remind you for the first time in 43 years that the representatives of the State of Israel are talking directly with the representatives of the State of Lebanon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，由于以色列的成就，以色列改变了中东的面貌，并且他应特朗普的要求接受了与黎巴嫩的谈判：“我们以此改变了中东的面貌，并带来了……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，这是43年来以色列首次与黎巴嫩直接对话：“我提醒你们，这是43年来以色列国代表首次与黎巴嫩国代表直接对话。” @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 Russian Defense Ministry identifies 11 Ukrainian joint defense facilities in the European Union as potential strike targets. Note: Europe has joint production facilities manufacturing drones and other weapons systems for Ukraine.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯国防部将欧盟境内的11个乌克兰联合防御设施确定为潜在打击目标。注：欧洲拥有为乌克兰制造无人机和其他武器系统的联合生产设施。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu called for patience in the fight against Hezbollah, stressing it won't be over tomorrow: ​"This will not be achieved tomorrow. It requires a continuous effort; it requires patience, it requires strategic…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has changed the face middle east due to Israels achievements and that he accepted negotiations with Lebanon at Trumps request: ​"With which we changed the face of the Middle East and brought about tremendous achievements. We agreed to a temporary ceasefire in Lebanon; at Trump's request, an opportunity will be given to promote an integrated political and military solution with the government of Lebanon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡呼吁在打击真主党的斗争中保持耐心，强调明天不会结束：“这不会在明天实现。它需要持续的努力；它需要耐心，它需要战略……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，由于以色列的成就，以色列改变了中东的面貌，并且他应特朗普的要求接受了与黎巴嫩的谈判：“我们以此改变了中东的面貌，并取得了巨大的成就。我们同意在黎巴嫩实行临时停火；应特朗普的要求，我们将有机会推动与黎巴嫩政府的综合政治和军事解决方案。” @wfwitness

text: A small fire broke out on the USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN-69) during maintenance at a Virginia shipyard. Three sailors had minor injuries and returned to duty. The fire was quickly contained, and the cause is under investigation. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 在弗吉尼亚州的一个造船厂进行维护期间，美国“德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔”号航空母舰（CVN-69）发生了一场小火灾。三名水手受轻伤并已重返岗位。火势很快得到控制，起火原因正在调查中。来源：福克斯新闻

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu admitted that the fight against Hezbollah is not over: "But I say in all honesty: we have not finished the job yet. There are things we plan to do against the threat of the remaining rockets and against…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu called for patience in the fight against Hezbollah, stressing it won't be over tomorrow: ​"This will not be achieved tomorrow. It requires a continuous effort; it requires patience, it requires strategic endurance, and it requires intelligent navigation in the diplomatic arena." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡承认，打击真主党的斗争尚未结束：“但我诚实地说：我们还没有完成工作。我们计划针对剩余火箭弹的威胁采取一些行动，并针对……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡呼吁在打击真主党的斗争中保持耐心，强调明天不会结束：“这不会在明天实现。它需要持续的努力；它需要耐心，它需要战略耐力，它需要在外交舞台上进行明智的导航。” @wfwitness

text: Senior Iranian military official on the opening of Strait of Hormuz: Only non-military vessels can transit, through designated routes and with IRGC Navy approval. Civilian ships must follow routes set by Iran’s Ports and Maritime Organization. Source: IRIB
text_zh: 伊朗高级军事官员谈霍尔木兹海峡的开放：只有非军事船只可以通过指定航线并在获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军批准的情况下通行。民用船只必须遵守伊朗港口和海事组织设定的航线。来源：伊朗伊斯兰共和国广播电视台（IRIB）

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that Israel has destroyed 90% of Hezbollah’s missile and rocket stockpile and that it's a shadow of what it once was: ​"Regarding the distant threat, we destroyed close to 90% of the missile and rocket…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu admitted that the fight against Hezbollah is not over: "But I say in all honesty: we have not finished the job yet. There are things we plan to do against the threat of the remaining rockets and against the drones threat—I will not elaborate—but we also have another goal, and that is the dismantling of Hezbollah." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已经摧毁了真主党90%的导弹和火箭弹库存，它已不复当年：“关于远距离威胁，我们摧毁了纳斯鲁拉建立的近90%的导弹和火箭弹……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡承认，打击真主党的斗争尚未结束：“但我诚实地说：我们还没有完成工作。我们计划针对剩余火箭弹的威胁和无人机威胁采取一些行动——我不会详细说明——但我们还有另一个目标，那就是瓦解真主党。” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu on Lebanon: We achieved great accomplishments. We created for the first time a long security zone along the entire northern border. This strip completely removes the close threat of invasion. We destroyed nearly 90% of the missile and rocket stockpiles.” Hezbollah today is a shadow of itself. We haven’t finished the job yet. This will not be achieved tomorrow. It requires patience and continuous effort. We agreed to a temporary ceasefire in Lebanon. For the first time in 43 years, Israel and Lebanon are talking directly. We will give an opportunity for a diplomatic and military solution. The road to peace is still long, but we have begun it. Our one hand holds the weapon, our other hand is extended for peace.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡谈黎巴嫩：我们取得了巨大的成就。我们首次在整个北部边界沿线建立了一个长期的安全区。这一地带彻底消除了近距离的入侵威胁。我们摧毁了近90%的导弹和火箭弹库存。今天的真主党已不复当年。我们还没有完成工作。这不会在明天实现。它需要耐心和持续的努力。我们同意在黎巴嫩实行临时停火。43年来，以色列和黎巴嫩首次直接对话。我们将提供一个外交和军事解决方案的机会。通往和平的道路依然漫长，但我们已经开始了。我们一手持武器，另一手伸向和平。
